content.text:
You are analyzing an image (275x183 pixels).

Detect ALL people visible in the image. For each person output:
  - bbox: bounding box [x1, y1, x2, y2] in pixel coordinates
  - participant: true if the person is seated at a table and engaged in a meeting, false otherwise
  - speaking: true if the person appears to be actively speaking right now, false otherwise
  - reason: one concise sentence explaining your participant and speaking decisions

Output ONLY valid JSON, no extra text:
{"people": [{"id": "P01", "bbox": [x1, y1, x2, y2], "participant": true, "speaking": false, "reason": "..."}]}

Bounding boxes must be pixel coordinates within the image (275x183).

messages.content: {"people":[{"id":"P01","bbox":[111,35,185,124],"participant":true,"speaking":true,"reason":"the man is seated at the table; the man in the image has his mouth slightly open"},{"id":"P02","bbox":[0,38,64,156],"participant":true,"speaking":true,"reason":"She is seated at the table; the person in the image has her mouth slightly open and is looking toward the right (towar"},{"id":"P03","bbox":[192,36,275,179],"participant":true,"speaking":true,"reason":"The person is seated at the table"},{"id":"P04","bbox":[172,41,249,130],"participant":true,"speaking":true,"reason":"she is seated at the table; the person in the image has an open-mouthed smile and is looking engaged with the person t"},{"id":"P05","bbox":[49,42,95,125],"participant":true,"speaking":true,"reason":"The person is seated at the table"}]}
